name: Shrimp with Snow Peas & Water Chestnuts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Peas, snow - stems and string
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss shrimp with salt, add wine and marinate for 20 minutes to several hours.
2. Drain shrimp and reserve the marinade.
3. Heat a wok over high heat, add oil. Add ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
4. Add shrimp and stir-fry until opaque, 2 to 4 minutes depending on size.
5. Add snow peas and water chestnuts; stir-fry until just heated through.
6. Add reserved marinade, soy sauce, and cornstarch mixture. Bring to a boil and cook until the sauce thickens.
7. Serve immediately.
